name: Day 1 Active Experiments
rule: Every experiment must create measurable evidence. Waiting is not an experiment.

experiments.name: First paid audit
experiments.target_segment: small creators and small businesses with messy lead/payment workflows
experiments.kill_rule: Kill or rewrite if no evidence appears after assets and route are confirmed.

experiments.name: AI builder revenue wedge
experiments.target_segment: AI builders who can build apps but cannot package or sell them
experiments.kill_rule: Kill if no replies from platform ecosystem contacts.

experiments.name: Monthly retainer proof
experiments.target_segment: businesses with existing lead flow but weak follow-up
experiments.kill_rule: Do not push retainer before a real pain signal exists.
